pi_items.source: Task specification and NinjaTrader 8 backup workflow allow custom naming
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/creating_a_backup_archive.htm) confirms Templates is a selectable backup option
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/creating_a_backup_archive.htm) confirms Workspaces is a selectable backup option
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms Database/Historical trade data is a selectable backup option that should be excluded
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/creating_a_backup_archive.htm) confirms Log and Trace files is a selectable backup option
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms Trace files are part of Log and Trace files option
Official NinjaTrader 8 documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/creating_a_backup_archive.htm) confirms NinjaScript Files is a selectable backup option

pi_items.metadata_value: real Yahoo Finance data (SPY, AAPL, MSFT 2023-2024)
pi_items.verified_value: Yahoo Finance historical data for SPY, AAPL, MSFT from 2023-2024 (502 trading days from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31)
pi_items.source: Data files in /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/ (SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt) with OHLCV format; import_data.ps1 script confirms 'Yahoo Finance historical data'; data format documented as yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume

pi_items.metadata_value: Templates and Workspaces are required, others (Database, Log/Trace, NinjaScript) must be excluded
pi_items.verified_value: NinjaTrader 8 backup options include: Configuration files, Database, Historical Chart Data, Log and Trace files, Market Replay Data, NinjaScript Files, Templates, and Workspaces. Task correctly identifies which should be selected.
pi_items.source: Official NinjaTrader 8 support documentation at https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/creating_a_backup_archive.htm and https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/platform-technical-support-aa/1273560-systematic-way-to-backup-nt8-desktop

privileged_info_summary: The task involves backing up NinjaTrader 8 configuration files. Verified facts: (1) NinjaTrader 8 provides a Tools > Export > Backup feature with selectable options including Templates, Workspaces, Database, Log/Trace files, and NinjaScript files. (2) The task correctly specifies that Templates and Workspaces should be included in the backup. (3) The forbidden items (Database, Log/Trace files, NinjaScript files) are real backup options that should be excluded to keep the backup file small. (4) The environment contains real Yahoo Finance historical data (OHLCV format) for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT covering 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024. (5) The backup filename 'config_backup.zip' is a reasonable custom name consistent with NinjaTrader's backup naming flexibility.
